quality_fixes.description: Add declare(strict_types=1) to all PHP files
Consolidate all enums under src/v1/Enum namespace
Add PHPStan level 5 static analysis to CI
Upgrade PHPStan to level 6 — add missing array type annotations
Upgrade PHPStan to level 9 — add @var annotation for PROPERTY_MAP constant
Add 5 optional Recipe properties (expires, hasPart, publication, ineligibleRegion, interactionStatistic)
Add hasMerchantReturnPolicy to Offer (per-product return policies)
Phase 0: Restructure PHP codebase under php/ prefix
Add QuantitativeValue.unitText, Dataset.hasPart/isPartOf, Organization ProfilePage fields + fix mixed-array serialization in JsonLdGenerator

google_rich_results_types.note: ALL 31 Google Search Gallery categories covered (26 original + 5 sub-categories: Merchant listing, Product variants, Loyalty program, Return policy, Shipping policy). Book actions excluded (DataFeed type, not Rich Results Test).

low_priority: VacationRental: Review.contentReferenceTime (French listings only, very niche)
remaining_audit_findings.note: Property gap audit complete (all 23 standalone types). Most types at 100% coverage. QAPage Question/Answer image+video added via PR #376.

type_classification.note: Per audit #73: 88 total - 12 enums - 3 building-block-only = 73 standalone-parity-testable. QC architecture maxes at 73 for parity (building-block types validated through parents). E2E denominator is ~28 standalone types.

phpstan_max_assessment.note: Level max achieved. Fixed 3 mixed-offset errors with local array accumulator in AddPropertiesToObject().

agent_sessions.title: Phase 1: TypeScript scaffold
Phase 2a: Port all 12 enums to TypeScript
Phase 2b: Port leaf sub-types batch 1 (9 types)
Phase 2c: Port leaf sub-types batch 2 (9 types)
Phase 3a: Port 12 Level-0 schema types (no schema deps)
Phase 3b: Port 9 Level-1 schema types
Phase 3c: Port 8 Level-2 schema types
Phase 3d: Port 6 schema types (Level 3-5)
Phase 3e: Port 9 schema types (Level 5-6)
Phase 3f: Port 10 schema types (Level 7)
Phase 3g: Port 11 schema types (Level 8+, final batch)
Phase 4a: npm package polish (metadata, README, build verification)
Phase 4b: npm publish workflow
agent_sessions.note: Workflow file — Eva must merge. NPM_TOKEN secret also needed.

agent_sessions.title: Port QAPage + Restaurant to TypeScript (audit #37 fix)
Add build-artifact smoke test (verify-build script)
agent_sessions.note: Per audit #39. Validates npm pack tarball: ESM + CJS imports + JSON-LD output.

agent_sessions.title: Refactor TS constructors to options-object pattern (batch 1: A-D)
Refactor TS constructors to options-object pattern (batch 2: E-M)
Refactor TS constructors to options-object pattern (batch 3: O-V)
Fix 5 PHPStan level max errors in JsonLdGenerator.php
Add JobPosting beta properties (PHP + TS)
Add Review.positiveNotes and Review.negativeNotes (PHP + TS)
Add SeekToAction and VideoObject.potentialAction (PHP + TS)
Add missing recommended properties (QuantitativeValue.unitText, Dataset.hasPart/isPartOf, Org ProfilePage fields) + fix mixed-array serialization
agent_sessions.note: Revision required for mixed-array serialization bug in JsonLdGenerator. Fixed per-element type dispatch.

agent_sessions.title: Add AggregateRating.itemReviewed (PHP + TS)
Comprehensive quality sweep: QAPage properties + edge-case tests + README
agent_sessions.note: First high-complexity dispatch per Eva #372. Part 1 (Question/Answer image+video) and Part 3 (README) delivered. Part 2 (test expansion) underdelivered — only 2 types covered with data-provider padding. Follow-up needed for genuine edge-case test expansion.

agent_sessions.title: Cross-language parity verification tool
agent_sessions.note: First auditing tool dispatch per Eva #372. Created tools/parity-check.ts. Known limitation: TS extends interface regex doesn't handle FoodEstablishmentOptions extends LocalBusinessOptions. Affects 1/88 classes.

agent_sessions.title: Rewrite parity-check tool to use AST parsing instead of regex
agent_sessions.note: Rewrites tools/parity-check.ts to use TypeScript Compiler API + php-parser (glayzzle). Fixes FoodEstablishmentOptions extends bug. Per Eva directive: AST over regex.

agent_sessions.title: Add TypeScript examples to all README usage sections
agent_sessions.note: README has 34 PHP examples but only 1 TS example. 6 examples had missing required constructor properties. Fixed in revision. Merged cycle 112.

agent_sessions.title: Expand edge-case test coverage for 10 standalone schema types (PHP + TS)
agent_sessions.note: 52 new tests across 10 types in both PHP and TS. Minor overlaps with existing tests but genuine edge cases. Merged cycle 112.

agent_sessions.title: Convert WebPageElement to options-object constructor pattern
agent_sessions.note: Last remaining positional-param TS class. Missed during cycle 104 refactoring. 6 files updated, CI green on all 9 checks.

agent_sessions.title: Upgrade PHPStan to level max: fix 3 mixed-offset errors in JsonLdGenerator
agent_sessions.note: Fixed mixed-offset access with local array accumulator. PHPStan config upgraded 9->max. CI green on all 7 checks.

qc_status.request_165: COMPLETE. QC issue #41 closed. 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors, 158 warnings. @graph API also validated.
qc_status.report_57: ALL FIXES MERGED AND VALIDATED. PRs #198, #199. QC-63 confirmed: 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors, 19 warnings.
qc_status.request_200: COMPLETE. QC-63 validated. 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors, 19 warnings (down from 58, 67% reduction). Issues #195 and #200 closed.
qc_status.report_72: FIXED. PR #214 merged. Added 5 optional Recipe properties (expires, hasPart, publication, ineligibleRegion, interactionStatistic). QC request #215 sent.
qc_status.request_215: COMPLETE. QC repo #74 closed. QC PR #76 merged (10:16 UTC). 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors. All 5 Recipe optional properties validated. Issue #215 closed.
qc_status.request_234: COMPLETE. QC repo #84 closed. 188 QC unit tests, 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors, 15 warnings (all known false positives). Offer.hasMerchantReturnPolicy validated. Issue #234 closed.
qc_status.request_331: PARITY COMPLETE. QC-ACK #138. Parity: 73/73 standalone types (100%). 0 E2E errors, 25 warnings (false positives). Class inventory: 88/88 PHP=TS. Per audit #73, 73 is the maximum achievable (3 building-block types validated through parents). Publish gate satisfied.
qc_status.request_265: COMPLETE. QC repo #114 closed. 188 tests, 1133 assertions, ALL PASS. 39/39 E2E, 0 errors, 15 warnings (known false positives). Phase 0 gate cleared.
qc_status.request_299: COMPLETE. QC-ACK #122 closed (2026-03-01T16:37Z). 23/23 parity match, 0 E2E errors, 14 warnings (known false positives). All DoD criteria satisfied: top-level parity, propertyMap, inheritance chains, Adobe E2E. Issue #299 closed.

Eva creates GitHub Release to trigger publish

copilot_metrics.note: 31 dispatches, 31 merged, 0 in-flight. 2 revision rounds total (#364 mixed-array bug, #384 missing required props). Zero silent failures.

last_cycle.summary: Cycle 119: Closed resolved input-from-eva issues #329 and #401 with detailed summaries. Noted Eva applied workflow change (commit 1b8ff8f) — verify-build now in TS CI. Closed question-for-eva #403. Proactive improvement scan. Awaiting Eva for npm publish.

total_testable_types_note: 88 schema classes - 12 enums = 76 testable. Of those, 73 can be parity-tested standalone; 3 are building-block-only types validated through parent types. Per audits #62, #68, #73. Publish gate uses 73 (standalone-parity-testable).
